query:
-- Preços de médico configurados
SELECT bdp.id, bdp.unit_id, u.name as unit_name, bdp.doctor_user_id, usr.name as doctor_name, bdp.financial_responsible_id, bdp.price_per_report, bdp.starts_at
FROM billing_doctor_unit_prices bdp
JOIN units u ON u.id = bdp.unit_id
JOIN users usr ON usr.id = bdp.doctor_user_id
ORDER BY bdp.unit_id, bdp.starts_at DESC;

-- Responsável financeiro da PACSML
SELECT fru.id, fru.unit_id, fru.financial_responsible_id, fr.legal_name, fru.starts_at
FROM financial_responsible_units fru
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.financial_responsible_id
WHERE fru.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY fru.starts_at DESC LIMIT 3;

-- Preços de médico configurados
SELECT bdp.id, bdp.unit_id, u.name as unit_name, bdp.doctor_user_id, usr.name as doctor_name, bdp.financial_responsible_id, bdp.price_per_report, bdp.starts_at
FROM billing_doctor_unit_prices bdp
JOIN units u ON u.id = bdp.unit_id
JOIN users usr ON usr.id = bdp.doctor_user_id
ORDER BY bdp.unit_id, bdp.starts_at DESC;

-- Responsável financeiro da PACSML
SELECT fru.id, fru.unit_id, fru.financial_responsible_id, fr.legal_name, fru.starts_at
FROM financial_responsible_units fru
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.financial_responsible_id
WHERE fru.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY fru.starts_at DESC LIMIT 3;
